name: Lasagna Al Pesto
keywords: casseroles vegetarian main dishes italian cheese &
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds ricotta cheese, part skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Clean and stem the spinach. Chop it very fine. Set aside temporarily.
3. In a large, heavy skillet, sauté the onions in 2 tablespoons of olive oil over low heat until the onions are soft and clear, about 5-8 minutes. Add salt and pepper in moderate amounts; remove the skillet from the heat. Stir in the raw chopped spinach and stir well. Transfer to a large bowl.
4. Add pesto and ricotta to the bowl; mix thoroughly.
5. Meanwhile, put a pot of water to boil for the lasagna noodles. Cook the pasta until just barely tender, about 2 minutes. Drain the lasagna noodles, rinse under cold running water, and drizzle with remaining olive oil so they do not stick together.
6. Spray a 9" x 13" baking dish with non-stick cooking spray. Layer 1/4 of the noodles in the bottom of the dish; spread with 1/3 of the spinach/pesto/ricotta mixture over the noodles; sprinkle 1/3 of the grated mozzarella cheese over. Repeat with another layer of noodles, filling and cheese; repeat a third time. Finish with final layer of noodles; sprinkle on parmesan cheese. Drizzle with additional olive oil if desired.
7. Cover with foil and bake for 35-40 minutes.
